sections.title: Getting started
Talking to Denulth

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Hello citizen, how can I help?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any quests for me?

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: I don't know if you can help us!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: The trolls have taken up camp on Death Plateau! They are using it to launch raids at night on the village. We have tried to attack the camp but the main path is heavily guarded!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Perhaps there is a way you can sneak up at night?

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: If there is another way I do not know of it.

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Do you know of such a path?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No but perhaps I could try and find one?

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Citizen you would be well rewarded!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: If you go up to Death Plateau be very careful as the trolls will attack you on sight!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll be careful.

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: One other thing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's that?

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: All of our equipment is kept in the castle on the hill.

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: The stupid guard that was on duty last night lost the combination to the lock! I told the Prince that the Imperial Guard should've been in charge of security!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No problem, what does the combination look like?

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: The equipment room is unlocked when the stone balls are placed in the correct order on the stone mechanism outside it. The right order is written on a piece of paper the guard had.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A stone what...?!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Well citizen, the Prince is fond of puzzles. Why we couldn't just have a key is beyond me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll get on it right away!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, sorry.

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Never mind citizen.

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Can I assist you with anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this place?

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Welcome to the Principality of Burthorpe!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: We are the Imperial Guard for his Royal Highness Prince Anlaf of Burthorpe.

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Can I assist you with anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You can't, thanks.

sections.title: Talking to Denulth again

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Hello citizen, is there anything you'd like to know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you remind me of the quest I am on?

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: You offered to see if you could find another way up Death Plateau. We could then use it to sneak up and attack the trolls by night.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah yes, and the guard had lost the combination to your equipment room in the castle on the hill?

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: That's right citizen, you offered to recover the combination and unlock the door.

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Is there anything else you would like to know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I thought the White Knights controlled Asgarnia?

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: You are right citizen. The White Knights have taken advantage of the old and weak king, they control most of Asgarnia, including Falador. However they do not control Burthorpe!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: We are the prince's elite troops! We keep Burthorpe secure!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: The White Knights have overlooked us, until now! They are pouring money into their war against the Black Knights, they are looking for an excuse to stop our funding and I'm afraid they may have found it!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: If we can not destroy the troll camp on Death Plateau then the Imperial Guard will be disbanded and Burthorpe will come under control of the White Knights. We can not let this happen!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Is there anything else you would like to know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's all, thanks.

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: God speed citizen.

sections.title: Trying to enter Harold's room before talking to Eohric

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd better not go into someone's bedroom without a reason!

sections.title: Finding the combination
Talking to Eohric

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Eohric
lines.text: Hi, can I help?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm looking for the guard that was on last night.

lines.speaker: Eohric
lines.text: There was only one guard on last night. Harold. He's a nice lad, if a little dim.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know where he is staying?

lines.speaker: Eohric
lines.text: Harold is staying at the Toad and Chicken.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know of another way up Death Plateau?

lines.speaker: Eohric
lines.text: No, sorry. I wouldn't want to go north-east from here, it's very rocky and barren.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'm just looking around.

sections.title: Entering Harold's room

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: Come in!

sections.title: Talking to Harold

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're the guard that was on duty last night?

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Denulth said that you lost the combination to the equipment room?

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: I don't want to talk about it!

sections.title: Talking to Harold again

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're the guard that was on duty last night?

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: I said I don't want to talk about it!

sections.title: Talking to Eohric after talking to Harold

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Eohric
lines.text: Hi, can I help?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found Harold but he won't talk to me!

lines.speaker: Eohric
lines.text: Hmm. Harold has got in trouble a few times over his drinking and gambling. Perhaps he'd open up after a drink?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, I'll try that!

sections.title: Talking to Eohric again after learning Harold's weakness

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Eohric
lines.text: Hi, can I help?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You said that Harold had a weakness?

lines.speaker: Eohric
lines.text: Yes, if you buy Harold a beer he might talk to you. I also know he has a weakness for gambling. Hope that helps!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for the help!

sections.title: Talking to Harold after learning his weakness

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I buy you a drink?

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: Now you're talking! An Asgarnian Ale please!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll go and get you one.

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: Arrh. That hit the spot!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where were you when you last had the combination?

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: I honestly don't know! I've looked everywhere. I've searched the castle and my room!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you tried looking between here and the castle?

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: Yeah, I tried that.

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: I need another beer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Would you like to gamble?

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: Good. Good. I have some dice. How much do you want to offer?

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: Woah! Do you think I'm made of money? Max bet is 1000 gold.

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: OK. I'll roll first!

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: Don't forget that once I start my roll you can't back out of the bet! If you do you lose your stake!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I buy you a drink?

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: Sounds good! I normally drink Asgarnian Ale but you know what?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: I really fancy one of those Blurberry Specials. I never get over to the Gnome Stronghold so I haven't had one for ages!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll go and get you one.

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: Wow!

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: Now THAT hit the spot!

sections.title: Talking to Harold after giving him an Asgarnian ale

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: Hi.

sections.title: Talking to Harold after giving him a Blurberry special

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: 'Ello matey!

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: Hmm...!

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: What wash the queshtion?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Would you like to gamble?

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: Shure!

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: Place your betsh pleashe!

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: *giggle*

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: Eashy tiger! Max bet ish 1000 coinsh.

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: Right...er...here goes...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I buy you a drink?

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: I fink I've had enough!

sections.title: Finishing a gamble

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: Oh dear, I seem to have run out of money!

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: Here's what I have.

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: I'll write you out an IOU for the rest.

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: Shixteen! How am I shupposhed to beat that!

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: I didn't know you could ushe four dishe. Oh well.

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: *hic*

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: I sheemed to have rolled a one.

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: Um...not enough money.

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: Heresh shome of it.

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: I owe you the resht!

sections.title: Talking to Harold after losing the IOU

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've lost the IOU you gave me.

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: I'll write you another.

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: *hic*

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've lost the IOU you gave me.

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: Oh dear.

sections.title: Talking to Harold while still holding the IOU if Harold is not drunk

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Would you like to gamble?

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: I've run out of money!

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: Oh dear. I need beer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I buy you a drink?

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: Now you're talking! An Asgarnian Ale please!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll go and get you one.

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: *burp*

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: Mmm... Asgarnian Ale.

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: Arrh. That hit the spot!

sections.title: Talking to Harold while still holding the IOU if Harold is drunk

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: *hic*

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Would you like to gamble?

lines.speaker: Harold
lines.text: I'm shure I had money, not anymore!

sections.title: Reading the IOU

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The IOU says that Harold owes me some money.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wait just a minute!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The IOU is written on the back of the combination! The stupid guard had it in his back pocket all the time!

sections.title: Using Asgarnian ale on Harold

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I buy you a drink?

sections.title: Completing the ball combination
Talking to Archer upstairs in the equipment room

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Archer
lines.text: Thank goodness you opened that door! I've been trapped here since last night!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No problem!

sections.title: Talking to Eohric after opening the equipment room

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Eohric
lines.text: Hi, can I help?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this castle?

lines.speaker: Eohric
lines.text: Welcome to Burthorpe Castle! Home to his Royal Highness the Prince of Burthorpe, Heir to the Throne of Asgarnia!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow!

lines.speaker: Eohric
lines.text: Anything else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where is the prince?

lines.speaker: Eohric
lines.text: We do not disclose his majesty's business.

lines.speaker: Eohric
lines.text: Anything else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any quests for me?

lines.speaker: Eohric
lines.text: Yes actually I do, we need another servant.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Does this noble quest have a name?

lines.speaker: Eohric
lines.text: Yes, it's the... er... Empty the Cesspit Quest!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll give it a miss!

lines.speaker: Eohric
lines.text: Anything else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'm just looking around.

sections.title: New route up Death Plateau
Talking to Denulth after opening the equipment room

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Hello citizen, is there anything you'd like to know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you remind me of the quest I am on?

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: You offered to see if you could find another way up Death Plateau. We could then use it to sneak up and attack the trolls by night.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah yes, and the guard had lost the combination to your equipment room in the castle on the hill?

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: That's right citizen, you offered to recover the combination and unlock the door.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've unlocked the equipment room so I just need to find an alternate route up Death Plateau!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Good work citizen!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Is there anything else you would like to know?

sections.title: Talking to Soldier near Death Plateau

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you OK?

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: Urrrgggh.....

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: I'll be OK, the trolls only leave the plateau at nightfall. The guys are bringing a stretcher shortly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: As long as you're sure.

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: It's my own fault really, I was having a walk and wandered past the danger sign. The trolls throw rocks down at any one who goes up the path!

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: Don't go up there!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: OK, thanks for the warning.

sections.title: Opening Tenzing's door before talking to Saba

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: No milk today! Thank you!

sections.title: Talking to Saba

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Saba
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm looking for the guard that was on duty at the castle last night.

lines.speaker: Saba
lines.text: Who?!

lines.speaker: Saba
lines.text: Buzz off!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know of another way up Death Plateau?

lines.speaker: Saba
lines.text: Why would I want to go up there? I just want to be left in peace!

lines.speaker: Saba
lines.text: It used to be just humans trampling past my cave and making a racket. Now there's those blasted trolls too! Not only do they stink and argue with each other loudly but they are always fighting the humans.

lines.speaker: Saba
lines.text: I just want to be left in peace!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah... I might be able to help you.

lines.speaker: Saba
lines.text: How?!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm trying to help the...er...humans to reclaim back Death Plateau. If you help me then at least you'd be rid of the trolls.

lines.speaker: Saba
lines.text: Hmph.

lines.speaker: Saba
lines.text: Let me see...

lines.speaker: Saba
lines.text: I've only been up Death Plateau once to complain about the noise but those pesky trolls started throwing rocks at me!

lines.speaker: Saba
lines.text: Before the trolls came there used to be a nettlesome Sherpa that took humans exploring or something equally stupid. Perhaps he'd know another way.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where does this Sherpa live?

lines.speaker: Saba
lines.text: I don't know but it can't be far as he used to be around all the time!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing, sorry!

sections.title: Talking to Saba before visiting Tenzing

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Saba
lines.text: Have you got rid of those pesky trolls yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where did you say this Sherpa was?

lines.speaker: Saba
lines.text: I dunno but he must live around here somewhere!

sections.title: Opening Tenzing's door after talking to Saba

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: No milk today! Thank you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not the milkman, I need your help!

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: Oh...OK. You'd better come in then.

sections.title: Trying to enter Tenzing's chicken pen

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: Where do you think you're going? This is private property!

sections.title: Talking to Tenzing

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: Hello. How can I help?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm helping the Imperial Guard. They need to find a way to sneak up Death Plateau to destroy the troll camp! Saba seemed to think you'd be able to help.

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: Ah...Saba is still alive and kicking?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeh, he seemed very bitter.

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: That's Saba alright!

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: I do know of a secret way up to Death Plateau, the Imperial Guard would be able to use it at night and not be seen until it was too late!

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: I'd be happy to show you it if you do something for me first.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Name it.

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: I don't get into town much and I'm getting low on supplies. I need ten loaves of bread and ten cooked trout, that should see me through the winter.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Anything else?

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: Yes. My climbing boots need to have new spikes, so can you take them to Dunstan in Burthorpe? He always puts my spikes on for me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: OK, I'll get those for you.

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: Thank you traveller!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll find the secret way for myself.

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: Hmph.

sections.title: Talking to Tenzing before fixing the boots

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: Has Dunstan added spikes to my climbing boots yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, not yet.

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: Well, when he has, bring the boots to me with ten loaves of bread and ten cooked trout. I have to prepare for the winter, after all.

sections.title: Talking to Dunstan

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Hi! How can I help?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tenzing has asked me to bring you his climbing boots, he needs to have spikes put on them.

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: He does, does he? Well I won't do it till he pays for the last set I made for him!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This is really important!

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: How so?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I need the Sherpa to show me a secret way up Death Plateau so that the Imperial Guard can destroy the troll camp! He won't help me till I've got the spikes!

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Hmm. That's different!

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Tell you what, I'll make them for you on one condition.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: *sigh* What's the condition?

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: My son has just turned 16 and I'd very much like him to join the Imperial Guard. The Prince's elite forces are invite only so it's very unlikely he'll get in. If you can arrange that you have a deal!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That won't be a problem as I'm helping out the Imperial Guard!

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Excellent! You'll need to bring an Iron bar for the spikes!

sections.title: Talking to Dunstan again

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Have you managed to get my son signed up for the Imperial Guard?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet! I just need to speak to Denulth!

sections.title: Talking to Denulth after talking to Dunstan

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Hello citizen, have you found another way up Death Plateau?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes there is another way up Death Plateau!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: We are saved!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: There's one thing...

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: And what is that citizen?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: There is a Sherpa who will only show me the secret way if I first get some spikes for his climbing boots. The smith will only do this for me if you sign up his son for the Imperial Guard!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Hmm...this is very irregular.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Will you not do this?

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: I have heard of Dunstan's son, he is a very promising young man. For the sake of your mission we can make an exception!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: This certificate proves that we have accepted Dunstan's son for training in the Imperial Guard!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you Denulth, I shall be back shortly!

sections.title: Talking to Denulth after losing the certificate

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Hello citizen, have you found the secret way up Death Plateau?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm working on it but I've lost the certificate!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: No problem, I have a duplicate.

sections.title: Talking to Dunstan after losing the certificate

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Have you managed to get my son signed up for the Imperial Guard?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have but I don't have the entrance certificate on me.

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Good but I need to have the certificate.

sections.title: Talking to Dunstan while holding the certificate

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Have you managed to get my son signed up for the Imperial Guard?

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Thank you!

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Now to keep my end of the bargain. Give me the boots and an iron bar and I'll put on the spikes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you!

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: No problem.

sections.title: Talking to Dunstan before getting the spiked boots

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Now to keep my end of the bargain. Give me the boots and an iron bar and I'll put on the spikes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have the iron bar or the climbing boots.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have the climbing boots.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have the iron bar.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you!

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: No problem.

sections.title: Talking to Dunstan after getting the spiked boots

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: I see you've got the spiked boots. Are you going to take them to the Sherpa?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I will do shortly.

sections.title: Trying to wear the climbing boots
Trying to wear the spiked boots
Talking to Tenzing without climbing or spiked boots

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: Have you brought me the items I asked for?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've lost the climbing boots.

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: These are expensive, do not lose another pair!

sections.title: Talking to Tenzing while holding climbing or spiked boots

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: Have you brought me the items I asked for?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have the: Spiked boots. Ten loaves of bread. Ten cooked trout.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have the: Spiked boots. Ten loaves of bread.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have the: Spiked boots. Ten cooked trout.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have the: Ten loaves of bread. Ten cooked trout.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have the: Spiked boots.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have the: Ten loaves of bread.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have the: Ten cooked trout.

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: Thank you very much traveller. I'm now ready for the winter!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You said you would show me the secret way to Death Plateau?

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: Yes, of course! I drew up a map in case I ever needed to use it again.

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: I don't think the Trolls have found the secret way yet, if they had I would've been attacked by now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: OK thanks but I think I'd better check the path. I don't want to send the Imperial Guards to their death!

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: You are wise for one so young.

sections.title: Talking to Tenzing after losing the map

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Tenzing!

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: Hello again traveller. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've lost the secret way map.

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: Never mind. I'll quickly draw you another one.

sections.title: Talking to Tenzing while holding the map

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Tenzing!

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: Hello again traveller. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm lost!

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: To get back to Burthorpe follow the path going east.

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: I thought you were going to investigate the secret way to Death Plateau? Use the back door to my hut, hop over the stile and follow that path.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh yes, of course! Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing, thanks.

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: Go in peace traveller.

sections.title: Talking to Saba after getting the map

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Saba
lines.text: Have you got rid of those pesky trolls yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm working on it!

lines.speaker: Saba
lines.text: Grr!

sections.title: Trying to climb rocks to troll country
Walking far enough up the Death Plateau trail

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think this is far enough, I can see Death Plateau and it looks like the trolls haven't found the path. I'd better go and tell Denulth.

sections.title: Finishing up
Talking to Tenzing after scouting the path

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Tenzing!

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: Hello again traveller. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm lost!

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: To get back to Burthorpe follow the path going east.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh yes, of course! Thanks!

sections.title: Talking to Denulth after opening the equipment room and exploring the path

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Hello citizen, have you found the secret way up Death Plateau?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes! There is a path that runs from a Sherpa's hut around the back of Death Plateau. The trolls haven't found it yet. The Sherpa made a map I can give you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have the map on me.

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Excellent, this looks perfect. They will never see us coming.

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Have you managed to open the equipment room?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have opened the door but I don't have the combination on me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes! The door is open and here is the combination.

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Well done citizen! We will reward you by training you in attack!

sections.title: Talking to Denulth after giving him the map but not the combination

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Hello citzen, I have the map of the secret way you gave me earlier.

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Have you managed to open the equipment room?

sections.title: Talking to Denulth after giving him the combination but not the map

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Hello citizen, have you found the secret way up Death Plateau?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes! There is a path that runs from a Sherpa's hut around the back of Death Plateau. The trolls haven't found it yet. The Sherpa made a map I can give you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have the map on me.

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Excellent, this looks perfect. They will never see us coming.

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: I have the combination to the equipment room that you recovered for me.

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Well done citizen! We will reward you by training you in attack!
